mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order_line ( order_id, line_no, product_id, relation_group_id, product_name_snapshot, item_kind_snapshot, processing_type_snapshot, tax_category_snapshot, tax_rule_id_snapshot, unit_name_snapshot, qty, unit_price, supply_amount, vat_amount, total_amount, shipment_status ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{lineNo}, #{productId}, #{relationGroupId}, #{productNameSnapshot}, #{itemKindSnapshot}, #{processingTypeSnapshot}, #{taxCategorySnapshot}, #{taxRuleIdSnapshot}, #{unitNameSnapshot}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{supplyAmount}, #{vatAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{shipmentStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, bc.company_name as buyer_company_name, sc.company_name as seller_company_name FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN tb_company bc ON o.buyer_company_id = bc.company_id LEFT JOIN tb_company sc ON o.seller_company_id = sc.company_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT * FROM tb_order_line WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY line_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
